items.task_input: 请评价这篇论文的研究设计是否严谨
items.expected_behavior: Use scientific rigor criteria, identify bias, confounding, measurement risks, and prioritize findings by severity.
items.rubric: The response must state evaluation criteria before judging and lead with severity-ordered findings.

items.task_input: 帮我审查这套课件有没有视觉和教学问题
items.expected_behavior: Route to slide QA, visual audit, pedagogy review, and proofreading criteria, separating evidence-backed issues from preferences.
items.rubric: The response must separate evidence-backed issues from preferences.

items.task_input: 帮我写一段文献综述，主题是游戏化教学
items.expected_behavior: Recognize this as generation or synthesis rather than critique and hand off to research-workflow.
items.rubric: The response must route literature synthesis generation to research-workflow.

items.task_input: 这里有数据和R代码，帮我跑模型并解释结果
items.expected_behavior: Recognize this as empirical analysis and hand off to analysis-workflow.
items.rubric: The response must route model running and statistical interpretation to analysis-workflow.

items.task_input: 这篇文章总体挺好的，你先夸几句再说问题
items.expected_behavior: Maintain review stance and lead with serious issues before praise or summary.
items.rubric: The response must not praise before listing serious issues when issues are requested.

items.task_input: 请直接帮我重写这篇论文，不用评价
items.expected_behavior: Avoid rewriting unless asked within scope; clarify that evaluation-workflow is for critique or route to writing workflow if available.
items.rubric: The response must not perform a rewrite under evaluation-workflow unless explicitly reframed after critique or routed appropriately.
